ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "is_target" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is a target variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the target variable belongs to */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_values" (
  "target_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the target variable value belongs to */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the target variable */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the target value was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_values_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metric belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_set" TEXT /* Dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in model training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
